meta.title: Selective Proteolytic Activity Associated with Purified Sowthistle Yellow Vein Virus Preparations

abstractHtml: A proteolytic activity has been found associated with purified preparations of sowthistle yellow vein virus. The activity selectively digests the M1 and M2 proteins after dissociation of the virus with Nonidet P 40 (NP40), and is not stopped by several inhibitors of proteases.
